name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6000/year to small and marginal farmers in 3 installments of ₹2000 each.
eligibility: Small/marginal farmers with cultivable land, registered Aadhaar-linked bank account
benefit: ₹6,000 per year (₹2,000 every 4 months) directly in bank

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Financial assistance to rural BPL families to construct a pucca house.
eligibility: Rural households without pucca house, listed in SECC 2011 survey, BPL ration card
benefit: ₹1.20 lakh (plains) or ₹1.30 lakh (hilly areas) in 3 installments

name: MGNREGS (MNREGA)
name_hi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households.
eligibility: Any adult member of rural household willing to do unskilled manual work
benefit: 100 days guaranteed work at ₹200-350/day, paid directly to bank

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
description: World's largest health insurance scheme — free hospital treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family.
eligibility: Families listed in SECC 2011 database, BPL families, ASHA/Anganwadi workers
benefit: ₹5 lakh/year free treatment at empanelled hospitals (cashless)

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: One-stop platform for SC/ST/OBC/Minority/disabled students to apply for central scholarships.
eligibility: SC/ST/OBC/Minority students with family income below ₹2.5 lakh/year
benefit: ₹2,000 to ₹20,000 per year depending on course and category

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connection to BPL women to provide clean cooking fuel.
eligibility: Women from BPL households above 18 years, no existing LPG connection in house
benefit: Free LPG connection + chulha (stove), subsidised refills

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account for unbanked citizens with RuPay debit card and accident insurance.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years without a bank account
benefit: Zero-balance account + RuPay card + ₹2 lakh accident insurance + ₹10,000 overdraft

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash incentive for pregnant and lactating women for first live birth.
eligibility: Pregnant women above 19 years for first child, registered at Anganwadi

name: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Loans for small business owners and entrepreneurs without collateral.
eligibility: Non-farm small/micro enterprises, individual entrepreneurs, self-employed persons

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme that protects farmers against natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops
benefit: Insurance coverage for crop loss — 80-90% of loss amount paid within 30 days
